items.title: Built-in Types — Python documentation
items.author: Python Software Foundation
items.note: Authoritative reference for int, float, str, list, tuple, dict, set and their operations.

items.title: The Python Data Model (objects, values and types)
items.author: Python Software Foundation
items.note: Explains how names bind to objects and how mutability and identity work.

items.title: PEP 8 — Naming conventions
items.author: Guido van Rossum, Barry Warsaw, Nick Coghlan
items.note: Style guide; see the naming section for variable naming (snake_case).

items.title: PEP 484 — Type Hints
items.author: Guido van Rossum, Jukka Lehtosalo, Łukasz Langa
items.note: Specifies optional type hints — useful context for why hints are not enforced at runtime.
